note: Canonical metric/KPI + report registry — single source of truth for the Reports & Analytics engine, the report templates (report-*.html), dashboard widgets, and OpenAPI /metrics + /reports endpoints. A metric definition is the contract: report templates bind <span class="mf" data-path="metric.<id>.value"> and dashboards read the same ids. Mirrors schemas.json conventions.

metricSchema.label: human label
metricSchema.unit: % | $ | count | days | hrs | x | score | rate
metricSchema.format: pct | currency | int | float | days | ratio | score
metricSchema.grain: the entity one value rolls up to (project, event, shift, listing, learner, org, period)
metricSchema.direction: up = higher is better | down = lower is better | flat = neutral
metricSchema.confidence: QUOTED | PUBLISHED | BENCHMARKED | MODELED | N/A (XPMS ladder)

on_time_delivery.label: On-Time Delivery
on_time_delivery.formula: milestones met by target date / total milestones

milestone_completion.label: Milestone Completion
milestone_completion.formula: completed milestones / planned milestones to date

schedule_variance.label: Schedule Variance
schedule_variance.formula: actual finish − baseline finish (per phase, summed)

change_order_value.label: Change Order Value
change_order_value.formula: sum of approved change-order net deltas

pipeline_value.label: Pipeline Value
pipeline_value.formula: sum of open opportunity value × stage probability

project_health.label: Project Health Index
project_health.formula: weighted 0–100 index of schedule, budget, scope & risk

response_rate_crew.label: Crew Response Rate
response_rate_crew.formula: assignments acknowledged (not in briefed/draft) / total issued assignments × 100

reminder_rate.label: Reminder Rate
reminder_rate.formula: reminder pushes sent / total assignments (lower = crew is self-managing)

cert_compliance.label: Certification Compliance
cert_compliance.formula: crew with valid required certs / crew deployed

ros_adherence.label: Run-of-Show Adherence
ros_adherence.formula: cues hit on time / total cues

asset_utilization.label: Asset Utilization
asset_utilization.formula: days out on rental / available days

gmv.label: GMV
gmv.formula: gross merchandise value across tickets + commerce + marketplace

ltv.label: Customer LTV
ltv.formula: avg margin per customer × expected lifetime

ceus_awarded.label: CEUs Awarded
ceus_awarded.formula: sum of CEUs from completed certifications

compliance_rate.label: Training Compliance
compliance_rate.formula: learners current on required training / total

time_to_complete.label: Time to Complete
time_to_complete.formula: avg days from enroll to completion

backlog_value.label: Contracted Backlog
backlog_value.formula: signed contract value not yet recognized

vendor_otd.label: Vendor On-Time Delivery
vendor_otd.formula: PO lines received by promise date / total

risk_exposure.label: Open Risk Exposure
risk_exposure.formula: sum of open risk value × probability

revenue_pacing.label: Revenue Pacing
revenue_pacing.formula: YTD collected revenue / (annual target × elapsed year fraction) × 100

pipeline_velocity.label: Pipeline Velocity
pipeline_velocity.formula: avg days from lead created to proposal sent

maintenance_compliance.label: PM Compliance
maintenance_compliance.formula: preventive-maintenance tasks done on time / scheduled

turnaround_time.label: Load In/Out Time
turnaround_time.formula: hours from dock to show-ready (and strike)

time_to_hire.label: Time to Hire
time_to_hire.formula: avg days from req open to accepted offer

onboarding_ramp.label: Onboarding Ramp
onboarding_ramp.formula: avg days new hire → role-ready certification

reportEnvelope.note: Every generated report is an instance of this envelope (the OpenAPI Report schema). Headline figures bind to metric.<id>.value|display|delta; contextual fields bind to the envelope paths below. Tables/charts bind to series[] rather than individual metrics.

fields.report.title: report title
fields.event.name: bound event name (event reports)
fields.metrics[]: array of resolved Metric objects (see openapi.components.Metric)

openapi.note: metrics.json projects 1:1 to these OpenAPI 3.1 components; the same definitions back the listed paths and are read by report templates (.mf data-path) AND dashboard widgets, so a KPI is defined once and cannot disagree across surfaces.

paths.GET /metrics/{id}: resolve one metric to a Metric object for a period/scope
paths.GET /reports/{report}: resolve a report definition to a Report object
paths.POST /reports/{report}/snapshot: freeze an immutable, versioned Report snapshot (append-only)

xpms.note: Metrics inherit the XPMS confidence ladder: each metric carries a confidence grade and MODELED values are labeled in report UIs. Reports are append-only snapshots (a generated report is immutable; re-runs create new versions). Metric ids are stable URID-adjacent keys; the /metrics + /reports OpenAPI endpoints project the same definitions used by report templates and dashboard widgets.
